subject: Ops note: mainecoon deployment schedule for North Europe | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-9037
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in North Europe needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Marie Curie seems to disagree with Albert Einstein on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-9037. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
